name: digestpilot
description: Aggregate trusted information streams into daily briefs and research-ready evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Daily briefs and research-ready evidence for agents.
interface.longDescription: DigestPilot helps agents aggregate RSS, public trend signals, source governance data, and local research evidence into reviewable daily briefs and research workflows.
defaultPrompt: Prepare an AI daily brief from my subscriptions.
Find public AI trends and produce trend cards.
Build a research evidence brief from archived feeds.
